response.original_title: Alex - Fahrradfahren! Ich will es schaffen
response.overview: Alex goes to a school for children with special educational needs and intellectual disabilities, where he learns the things necessary for independent living. From reading and counting to cooking and riding a bike. Each of his classmates approaches the assigned tasks in his own unique way and pace. Alex's goal is to pass the qualified cyclist exam at the end of the school year. Despite occasional setbacks, the boy does not want to give up. His teachers, family and classmates are a great support on his journey.
response.title: Alex - Everyone Is Special
